paper_title: Experimental Study on Quail Diets and Bone Analysis

methods.description: This method describes the experimental setup for studying the effects of bee pollen on quail diets, including the allocation of quails to dietary treatments, housing conditions, and the procedure for slaughter and bone collection.

steps.description: Hatched quail chicks were randomly allocated to two dietary treatments.
steps.searchable_summary: allocate quail chicks to dietary treatments

steps.description: All feeds used in the experiment were prepared in industrial feed mixing facility.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare experimental feeds in industrial facility

steps.description: The multiflora pollen was obtained from a commercial firm in Poland.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain multiflora pollen from commercial firm

steps.description: Bee pollen was collected every day during the harvest and dried at a temperature of 37˚C.
The nutrient composition of the diets and bee pollen was analyzed according to AOAC procedures.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze nutrient composition using AOAC procedures

steps.description: The diet and water were available ad libitum from day 1.
steps.searchable_summary: provide diet and water ad libitum

steps.description: The birds were housed in environmentally controlled poultry house.
The experiment lasted until 6 weeks of age.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct experiment until 6 weeks of age

steps.description: At the end of the experiment, 6 birds were randomly selected from each group, fasted for 8 h, weighed and slaughtered.
steps.searchable_summary: select, fast, weigh, and slaughter birds

steps.description: Both tibiae were dissected and kept frozen at -25˚C until further examination.

methods.description: This method outlines the process for preparing and analyzing bone samples for histomorphometric analysis, including fixation, sectioning, staining, and image analysis.

steps.description: The proximal end of left tibia was cut off and fixed in buffered formaldehyde.
Formalin-fixed samples were dehydrated with Ottix Plus, cleared with Ottix Shaper solvent substitutes, embedded in paraffin, and sectioned with a microtome in 4-μm slices.
steps.searchable_summary: dehydrate, clear, embed, and section samples

steps.description: Sections were stained with Picrosirius red and Goldner's trichrome staining.
steps.searchable_summary: stain sections with Picrosirius red and Goldner's trichrome

steps.description: Stained slides were observed in normal and polarized light by light microscopy.
steps.searchable_summary: observe stained slides under light microscopy

steps.description: PSR images were analysed using ImageJ software for assessment of morphometric traits.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze PSR images with ImageJ for morphometric traits
